name: Honey Soda Bread-NHB
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flours, baking soda, and salt until thoroughly mixed.
2. Cut in the butter and blend until the mixture resembles coarse meal. Mix in the raisins and caraway seeds.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the yogurt and honey; blend into the dry mixture.
4. Turn dough onto a lightly floured work surface; knead until smooth, about 1 minute.
5. Shape dough into a ball. Place on a lightly greased baking sheet.
6. With a sharp knife, cut a shallow "X" on top of the round.
7. Brush top with milk.
8. Bake at 325°F for 45 to 50 minutes, or until crust is golden brown and firm.
9. Cool before serving.
[Makes 1 loaf (6 servings). Nutrients Per Serving: Calories: 452 Sodium: 715 mg Carbohydrates: 86.9 g Protein: 10.6 g Cholesterol: 21.8 mg Dietary Fiber: 4.82 g Total Fat: 8.75 g Cal. from Fat: 17%]
